audit_items.proof_trace: The property is an explicit trust assumption that is faithfully implemented. `transmit` is gated by `PRICE_ADMIN_ROLE` and all prices are cryptographically verified by `verifyBulk()` before storage; no unprivileged path can inject prices. The absence of TWAP or circuit breakers is intentional design — the system treats verified Data Streams reports as authoritative within the staleness window.
